# CreatorArena

> AI co-pilot for new YouTube creators (0–1,000 subs). Watches what's outperforming in your niche, tells you exactly what to film this week, and tracks whether each video actually grew your channel.

CreatorArena turns competitor intelligence into a concrete weekly content plan — five video concepts with hooks, titles, thumbnail briefs, and target keywords — then measures whether each shipped video grew the channel so the AI keeps learning what works for that creator.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, who it's for, and how the weekly plan → measurement loop works.
